backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining types (ProductDetails, OrderDetails, ShoppingCart, DonationRecord, PaymentMethod) and implementing product management, shopping cart, orders, user profiles, donations, and access control with admin/user permissions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented donation features: header donation button, donation page with payment methods, React Query hooks for donations, and donation history display on orders page.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and utilities for the e-commerce application with donation functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with neutral grayscale palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the e-commerce shop application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, theme provider, authentication handling, profile setup dialog, and route definitions for all pages including products, cart, checkout, admin, orders, and donate.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright notice with heart icon and caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Navigation header with logo, donate button with heart icon, cart icon with item count badge, orders link, admin link (conditional), user name display, and login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Reusable product card component displaying product image, name, description, price, and add-to-cart button with click navigation to product detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: Modal dialog component that prompts new users to enter their name and saves it via useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation. Cannot be dismissed and blocks interaction until profile is created.
frontend/src/components/StripeSetupDialo: Controlled dialog component for configuring Stripe payment settings, accepting a secret key and comma-separated country codes. Submits configuration via useSetStripeConfiguration mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Initializes access control with admin token from URL params and invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validity. Provides authentication status and identity to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, products, cart management, orders, payments, donations, and Stripe configuration. Each mutation automatically invalidates related queries on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar using oklch color space.
frontend/src/lib/cartStore.ts: Zustand store with localStorage persistence for managing shopping cart state, including add/remove/update item operations and total item count calculation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing products (CRUD operations with image upload) and orders (status updates). Includes admin access check, Stripe configuration dialog, and order filtering by status.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Displays shopping cart with product list, quantity controls, and checkout button. Requires user authentication and integrates with cart store and product queries.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Handles checkout flow with payment method selection (Stripe or Coinbase ICP), creates orders, and redirects to payment processing or success/failure pages.
frontend/src/pages/DonatePage.tsx: Provides donation form with amount input, optional message, and payment method selection (Stripe or Coinbase ICP) for processing charitable contributions.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Displays user's order history and donations in tabbed interface with order details, status badges, and payment method information.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Shows payment failure message with options to retry checkout or return to shop.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Displays payment success confirmation with navigation options to view orders or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Shows detailed product view with image, description, price, quantity selector, and add-to-cart functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListingPage.ts: Main product listing page component that displays a hero banner and grid of products, with loading states and add-to-cart functionality requiring user authentication.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, animations, and plugin integrations for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking an e-commerce platform with ICP crypto payments, Shopify integration, and donation functionality, including existing features for donation UI/UX and pending backend donation processing.
